pois.name: Homer Cruise Dock
pois.notes: Dock on Homer Spit with views of Kachemak Bay and volcanic mountains.

pois.name: Homer Spit
pois.notes: 4.5-mile natural sand spit. Shops, restaurants, charter offices, and the famous Salty Dawg Saloon.

pois.name: Kachemak Bay State Park
pois.notes: Wilderness park across the bay. Accessible by water taxi. Hiking, kayaking, and glacier viewing.

pois.name: Halibut Cove
pois.notes: Artists colony on stilts across Kachemak Bay. Gallery walks and the Saltry restaurant.

pois.name: Alaska Islands & Ocean Visitor Center
pois.notes: Free federal visitor center with exhibits on marine ecosystems and wildlife.

pois.name: Bishops Beach
pois.notes: Accessible beach in town with tide pooling and volcanic mountain views.

pois.name: Pratt Museum
pois.notes: Natural history, marine ecology, and homesteading heritage of the Kachemak Bay area.

pois.name: Grewingk Glacier
pois.notes: Dramatic glacier in Kachemak Bay State Park. Accessible via water taxi and hiking trail.

pois.name: Homer Harbor
pois.notes: Commercial fishing harbor and halibut charter capital. Fresh catch daily.

pois.name: Skyline Drive Overlook
pois.notes: Panoramic viewpoint above Homer with views of Kachemak Bay, glaciers, and volcanoes.
